response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software engineer with web, mobile, and some embedded experience, but the resume shows no exposure to SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, deep learning workload optimization, GPU architecture, or hardware-software co-design. The Principal Performance Architect role requires deep specialization in hardware performance engineering for AI accelerators, which is a fundamentally different discipline from the candidate's software craftsmanship background.
strengths: Extensive senior-level software engineering experience across multiple domains
Some low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby (high-throughput micro-services)
Strong CS fundamentals with BS from ETH Zürich
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience
No deep learning workload, GPU, or AI accelerator optimization background
No SIMD/MIMD architecture or hardware-software co-design experience

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization background
